basic_details.job_title: DCHS Chittoor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Plumber, Electrician and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Coordinator of Hospital Services (DCHS Chittoor)
basic_details.short_information: District Coordinator of Hospital Services (DCHS Chittoor) Paramedical and Supporting Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 25 June 2026 on the official website chittoor.ap.gov.in. A total of 18 vacancies have been announced through the DCHS Chittoor Paramedical and Supporting Staff Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Ex-servicemen: 3 years in addition to service; Differently abled: 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: SSC or equivalent, Diploma in Electrical trade, ITI in relevant trade, Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course)
qualification.details: Electrician: Must have passed SSC or its equivalent. Diploma in Electrical trade. If a person possesses both diploma and ITI certificate, maximum percentage of marks obtained in either of the course shall be considered. Theatre Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Lab Attendant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Must Possess Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) conducted by the Board of Inter Education, AP or from any other institution recognized by the Govt of A.P. Plumber: Must have passed SSC or its equivalent exam from recognized board. Passed ITI plumbing trade/ITI Fitter trade /ITI mechanic trade from a recognized institution. General Duty Attendants GDA/MNO/FNO: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Post Mortem Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Office Subordinate: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

salary_details.details: Electrician: Rs. 22460 Per Month Theatre Assistant: Rs. 15000 Per Month Lab Attendant: Rs. 15000 Per Month Plumber: Rs. 18500 Per Month General Duty Attendants GDA/MNO/FNO: Rs. 15000 Per Month Post Mortem Assistant: Rs. 15000 Per Month Office Subordinate: Rs. 15000 Per Month

selection_process: Merit based on qualifying examination marks (75%) Weightage for experience after qualification (up to 10 marks) Weightage for Contract/Outsourcing/COVID service (up to 15%) Counselling
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCHS Chittoor Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://chittoor.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.district_coordinator_of_hospital_service: SSC or equivalent, Diploma in Electrical trade, ITI in relevant trade, Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course)

content_sections.heading: DCHS Chittoor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DCHS Chittoor Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DCHS Chittoor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Electrician: Must have passed SSC or its equivalent. Diploma in Electrical trade. If a person possesses both diploma and ITI certificate, maximum percentage of marks obtained in either of the course shall be considered. Theatre Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Lab Attendant: Must have passed SSC/10th or its equivalent. Must Possess Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) conducted by the Board of Inter Education, AP or from any other institution recognized by the Govt of A.P. Plumber: Must have passed SSC or its equivalent exam from recognized board. Passed ITI plumbing trade/ITI Fitter trade /ITI mechanic trade from a recognized institution. General Duty Attendants GDA/MNO/FNO: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Post Mortem Assistant: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board. Office Subordinate: Must have passed SSC/10th class or its equivalent from a recognized Board.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 5 years; Ex-servicemen: 3 years in addition to service; Differently abled: 10 years

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Electrician: Rs. 22460 Per Month Theatre Assistant: Rs. 15000 Per Month Lab Attendant: Rs. 15000 Per Month Plumber: Rs. 18500 Per Month General Duty Attendants GDA/MNO/FNO: Rs. 15000 Per Month Post Mortem Assistant: Rs. 15000 Per Month Office Subordinate: Rs. 15000 Per Month

Last Date for submission of Applications
Submission of grievances on provisional merit list
Display of Final Merit List and Selection list
Conducting of Counselling & Issue of appointment orders

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit based on qualifying examination marks (75%) Weightage for experience after qualification (up to 10 marks) Weightage for Contract/Outsourcing/COVID service (up to 15%) Counselling

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCHS Chittoor Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://chittoor.ap.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCHS Chittoor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of offline applications for the DCHS Chittoor Paramedical and Supporting Staff posts is 04-07-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Paramedical and Supporting Staff?
faq.answer: There are a total of 18 vacancies for various Paramedical and Supporting Staff positions released by the District Coordinator of Hospital Services (DCHS Chittoor).

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit, considering marks from the qualifying examination, weightage for experience, and weightage for contract/outsourcing/COVID service, followed by counselling.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. For SC/ST candidates, the fee is also Rs. 500/-, while PwBD candidates are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from SSC or equivalent to specific ITI or Diploma certifications in relevant trades like Electrical, Plumbing, or Lab Attendant courses.

faq.question: Q7. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via Speed Post/Registered Post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 15000 to Rs. 22460 per month, depending on the specific post and its pay scale.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DCHS Chittoor, which is https://chittoor.ap.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature, offering a fixed-term employment opportunity with the District Coordinator of Hospital Services.
